@@ -10,1328 +10,66 @@

-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strconv%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc maximumDetonation(bombs %5B%5D%5B%5Dint) int %7B%0A%09n := len(bombs)%0A%09%0A%09adj := make(%5B%5D%5B%5Dint, n)%0A%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A%09%09for j := 0; j %3C n; j++ %7B%0A%09%09%09if i == j %7B%0A%09%09%09%09continue %0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09%0A%09%09%09dx := int64(bombs%5Bi%5D%5B0%5D - bombs%5Bj%5D%5B0%5D)%0A%09%09%09dy := int64(bombs%5Bi%5D%5B1%5D - bombs%5Bj%5D%5B1%5D)%0A%09%09%09r := int64(bombs%5Bi%5D%5B2%5D)%0A%09%09%09%0A%09%09%09if dx*dx + dy*dy %3C= r*r %7B%0A%09%09%09%09adj%5Bi%5D = append(adj%5Bi%5D, j)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09maxDetonated := 0%0A%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A%09%09visited := make(%5B%5Dbool, n)%0A%09%09%0A%09%09count := dfs(i, adj, visited)%0A%09%09%0A%09%09if count %3E maxDetonated %7B%0A%09%09%09maxDetonated = count%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09return maxDetonated%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc dfs(u int, adj %5B%5D%5B%5Dint, visited %5B%5Dbool) int %7B%0A%09visited%5Bu%5D = true%0A%09count := 1 %0A%09%0A%09for _, v := range adj%5Bu%5D %7B%0A%09%09if !visited%5Bv%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09count += dfs(v, adj, visited)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09return count%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09parts := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A%09if len(parts) %3C 2 %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09%0A%09nl, _ := strconv.Atoi(parts%5B0%5D) %0A%0A%09bombs := make(%5B%5D%5B%5Dint, nl)%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C nl; i++ %7B%0A%09%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09%09return%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09tokens := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A%09%09bomb := make(%5B%5Dint, 3)%0A%09%09for j := 0; j %3C 3 && j %3C len(tokens); j++ %7B%0A%09%09%09bomb%5Bj%5D, _ = strconv.Atoi(tokens%5Bj%5D)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09bombs%5Bi%5D = bomb%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09fmt.Println(maximumDetonation(bombs)
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22
